title: Manual Hole GPS Tags and Callouts
notes: Both templates can now store manually entered latitude and longitude on individual holes.
MITHRIL does not request, capture, or use the iPad or browser location service.
GPS callout boxes and arrows can be shown or hidden without deleting the saved coordinate tags.
Callout boxes can be dragged to clear positions while their arrows remain attached to the correct holes.
Visible callouts are included in PDF output and latitude/longitude columns are included in CSV exports.
Multi Quick Fill, canvas backgrounds, Shot Info Back to Menu, and desktop wheel zoom remain included.
